statement: slot_delta_mod15 and fiber_delta_mod60 are non-label edge-record fields whose opposite monotones recover the Euclidean order once the four groups are known.
outside boundary span rises while inside fiber residual falls; boundary_gap orders edge, hinge, closed_face, filled_cell.
C_delta_mod15 exposes 12 form-pure two-row transition microcells.
native delta fields alone do not reconstruct the four six-row form groups exactly.
2,951 tested flat non-label row-field combinations did not cut the 24 rows into the four forms.
40 tested shared-endpoint/reciprocal incidence relations did not yield the four-form cut.
the six C-endpoint incidence components could not be refined into four forms by the tested second-field family.
20,910 tested microcell quotient aggregations did not recover the four Euclidean forms.
the failed cut searches suggest the missing grouping law may be in the upstream construction process rather than row fields.
the project needs a clean written boundary before more searches.
shuffle/ablation tests can tell whether the monotone and microcell signals survive without form labels.
